tests.scenario: Free user can access curated selection of free meditation guidance resources
steps: Create a new user account with no subscription
Log in to the app as the new user
Navigate to the meditation resource library
tests.expected_result: The user can view and access a curated selection of free meditation guidance resources

tests.scenario: Free user cannot access premium meditation guidance resources
steps: Create a new user account with no subscription
Log in to the app as the new user
Navigate to the meditation resource library
Verify that a section for premium resources exists
tests.expected_result: The premium resources are not accessible to the free user, with a clear indication that a subscription is required to access them

tests.scenario: User views subscription options with limited budget
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Navigate to the subscription or pricing page
Review the available subscription plans
tests.expected_result: The user sees a range of affordable plans with clear pricing information, including optional ad-supported free content.

tests.scenario: User compares subscription plans with ad-supported free content
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Navigate to the subscription or pricing page
Compare the features and pricing of different plans, including ad-supported free content
tests.expected_result: The user can easily compare the features and pricing of different plans, including the option to choose ad-supported free content, and can select the plan that best fits their budget and needs.

tests.scenario: Stable internet connection, accessing a meditation session
steps: Launch the mobile app
Ensure the device has a stable internet connection
Navigate to the meditation sessions page
Select a meditation session to start
tests.expected_result: The meditation session loads without interruption or delay, and the user can start meditating immediately

tests.scenario: Stable internet connection, accessing a sleep session
steps: Launch the mobile app
Ensure the device has a stable internet connection
Navigate to the sleep sessions page
Select a sleep session to start
tests.expected_result: The sleep session loads without interruption or delay, and the user can start the sleep session immediately

tests.scenario: Accessing a cached session without internet connection
steps: Launch the app and ensure a stable internet connection
Access and cache several meditation sessions
Disable internet connection on the device
Attempt to access a cached meditation session
tests.expected_result: The app allows access to the cached session without error or interruption

tests.scenario: Accessing a non-cached session without internet connection
steps: Launch the app and ensure a stable internet connection
Disable internet connection on the device
Attempt to access a meditation session that has not been cached
tests.expected_result: The app displays an error message or a 'no internet connection' message, but does not crash or become unresponsive

tests.scenario: Successful navigation to meditation course
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Log in to the app with valid credentials
Navigate to the meditation courses section
Select a meditation course
tests.expected_result: The app loads the selected meditation course within 2 seconds without crashing or freezing

tests.scenario: Successful navigation to meditation session
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Log in to the app with valid credentials
Navigate to the meditation sessions section
Select a meditation session
tests.expected_result: The app loads the selected meditation session within 2 seconds without crashing or freezing

tests.scenario: Successful course progression
steps: Launch the app and navigate to a meditation course
Complete a session within the course
Verify the progress display is updated
Verify a clear call-to-action for the next session is displayed
tests.expected_result: The app displays the user's updated progress and a clear call-to-action to start the next session within the same course

tests.scenario: Course completion with multiple sessions
steps: Launch the app and navigate to a meditation course with multiple sessions
Complete all sessions within the course
Verify the progress display shows 100% completion
Verify a clear call-to-action to revisit the course or start a new one is displayed
tests.expected_result: The app displays 100% completion of the course and provides a clear call-to-action to either revisit the course or start a new one

tests.scenario: Test Support Request Response Time and Resolution
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Navigate to the support section
Submit a support request with a subscription issue
Wait for 24 hours
Verify the response from the support team
Verify the response includes a clear plan to resolve the issue
tests.expected_result: The user receives a response within 24 hours with a clear plan to resolve the subscription issue.

tests.scenario: Test Refund Request Processing and Confirmation
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Navigate to the support section
Request a refund with a valid reason
Verify the refund is processed within 3-5 business days
Verify a confirmation email is sent to the user
tests.expected_result: The system automatically processes the refund within 3-5 business days and sends a confirmation email.

tests.scenario: Recurring App Crash Refund
steps: Launch the app and simulate a recurring app crash
Provide the user with a troubleshooting guide
Assume the issue persists after following the guide
Request a refund through the app's support system
tests.expected_result: The user receives a full or partial refund according to the app's refund policy

tests.scenario: Unsatisfied User Subscription Cancellation
steps: Subscribe to the app's premium services
Cancel the subscription due to dissatisfaction with performance
Provide feedback through the survey
tests.expected_result: The user receives a refund according to the app's refund policy and the feedback is recorded

tests.scenario: Valid Login Credentials
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Tap on the 'Log In' button
Enter a valid email address associated with an existing account
Enter a valid password associated with the same account
Tap on the 'Log In' button
tests.expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the app's home screen without any errors or credential issues

tests.scenario: Invalid Login Credentials
steps: Launch the mobile mindfulness app
Tap on the 'Log In' button
Enter an invalid email address or password
Tap on the 'Log In' button
tests.expected_result: The user is presented with a clear and specific error message indicating that the credentials are incorrect, and is not redirected to the app's home screen

tests.scenario: User views and selects a subscription plan with clear costs and features
steps: Launch the mobile app and navigate to the subscription plans page
Browse through the available subscription plans
Select a plan (e.g. monthly or yearly subscription)
Review the plan details, including costs, features, and terms
tests.expected_result: The user can clearly see the costs, features, and terms of the selected plan, including the subscription duration, price, and any benefits or limitations.

tests.scenario: User compares multiple subscription plans and confirms their selection
steps: Launch the mobile app and navigate to the subscription plans page
Browse through multiple available subscription plans
Compare the features and costs of different plans
Select a plan and review its details
Confirm their selection and proceed to payment
tests.expected_result: The user can easily compare multiple plans, select one, and confirm their selection, with a clear understanding of the costs, features, and terms of the chosen plan before completing the payment process.
